heading: Disaster warnings
label: 5132 Disaster warnings
notes: Amendments1994—Subsec. (c). substituted “” for “, Appendix,”.Pub. L. 103–337section 5196(c) of this titlesection 2281(c) of title 50
amendments: Amendments1994—Subsec. (c). substituted “” for “, Appendix,”.Pub. L. 103–337section 5196(c) of this titlesection 2281(c) of title 50

children.heading: Readiness of Federal agencies to issue warnings to State and local officials
children.label: a Readiness of Federal agencies to issue warnings to State and local officials
children.text: The President shall insure that all appropriate Federal agencies are prepared to issue warnings of disasters to State and local officials.

children.heading: Technical assistance to State and local governments for effective warnings
children.label: b Technical assistance to State and local governments for effective warnings
children.text: The President shall direct appropriate Federal agencies to provide technical assistance to State and local governments to insure that timely and effective disaster warning is provided.

children.heading: Warnings to governmental authorities and public endangered by disaster
children.label: c Warnings to governmental authorities and public endangered by disaster
children.text: The President is authorized to utilize or to make available to Federal, State, and local agencies the facilities of the civil defense communications system established and maintained pursuant to or any other Federal communications system for the purpose of providing warning to governmental authorities and the civilian population in areas endangered by disasters.section 5196(c) of this title

children.heading: Agreements with commercial communications systems for use of facilities
children.label: d Agreements with commercial communications systems for use of facilities
children.text: The President is authorized to enter into agreements with the officers or agents of any private or commercial communications systems who volunteer the use of their systems on a reimbursable or nonreimbursable basis for the purpose of providing warning to governmental authorities and the civilian population endangered by disasters.
